title: CreatedIssue
description: Details about a created issue or subtask.

id.description: The ID of the created issue or subtask.

key.description: The key of the created issue or subtask.

self.description: The URL of the created issue or subtask.

transition.description: The response code and messages related to any requested transition.

watchers.description: The response code and messages related to any requested watchers.
